title: MEDIATION IN LABOR DISPUTES
author: Kyselova O.I.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The article analyses categorical apparatus of the mediation procedure in Ukraine, features of its implementation (taking into account the adopted new Law of Ukraine "On Mediation" of November 16, 2021), the essence of the mediation procedure and its application to labor disputes, reveals the advantages of this method of resolving conflicts in the labor sphere, as well as identifies some problems of its implementation. The work highlights the main positive features of mediation, which are confidentiality, voluntariness, short deadlines for deciding on the dispute, as well as the ability to come to a common decision that suits both parties. The question of the difference between the resolution of the dispute in the commission on labor disputes and the mediation procedure is raised. Based on the results of the study, the authors conclude that the inclusion of mediation in the system of labor dispute settlement meets the goal of increasing the stability of labor relations and encourages employees and employers to seek a balance of interests.

keywords: mediation, mediation procedure, disputes settlement, labor law, labor disputes, individual and collective disputes
